Estrogen Receptor, Progesterone Receptor Tests

Estrogen Receptor, Progesterone Receptor Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are estrogen receptor/progesterone receptor (ER/PR) tests? 
Estrogen receptor/progesterone receptor (ER/PR) tests are done on samples of your tissue that contain breast cancer cells. The tests check if your cancer cells have estrogen and progesterone receptors (pr
